query:
SELECT 
  ms.id AS sessao_id,
  ms.sessionDate,
  ms.alunoId,
  a.name AS aluno_nome,
  ms.consultorId,
  c.name AS mentor_nome,
  ms.appointmentId,
  CASE WHEN ms.appointmentId IS NULL THEN 'SEM AGENDAMENTO' ELSE 'VINCULADA' END AS status_vinculo
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ms.consultorId = c.id
WHERE ms.sessionDate >= '2026-03-01' AND ms.sessionDate <= '2026-03-31'
ORDER BY ms.appointmentId IS NULL DESC, ms.sessionDate
LIMIT 20;
